prompt: Write a short blog post (about 200 words) on why people should read more books.
Write a short personal essay (about 200 words) about what a long walk can teach you.
Write a short opinion piece (about 200 words) on whether open-plan offices are a good idea.
Write a product description (about 150 words) for a new pair of wireless noise-cancelling headphones called the AuraPods Pro.
Write marketing copy (about 150 words) for a meal-kit delivery subscription called FreshCrate.
Write a beginner's guide (about 200 words) to starting composting at home.
Write a short how-to (about 200 words) explaining how to back up your photos safely.
Write an explainer (about 200 words) of how mRNA vaccines work, for an educated general audience.
Write an explainer (about 200 words) of what CRISPR gene editing is and how it works.
Write an overview (about 200 words) of the history and significance of the Silk Road.
